caption: A woman with dark hair and glasses is speaking against a plain, dark background. She is wearing a light green, short-sleeved top with delicate floral embroidery along the neckline. In the bottom left corner of each scene, a logo consisting of a circular graphic and the text "NPTEL" is visible. As she speaks, she uses her hands to emphasize her points; she begins by pointing with her right index finger, then shifts to a more neutral gesture with her hand raised, and finally opens both hands in an expansive motion. Her facial expressions change slightly as she articulates her words, with her mouth moving and her gaze remaining focused forward. The camera remains in a static medium shot throughout, focusing on her upper body and head.
